---
title: "Untitled"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-23"
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
```


```{r}
data <- read_csv( "C:/Users/zubareva/OneDrive - Tilburg University/Desktop/code/phd/data examples/ESMdata/ESMdata.csv")
names(data)[names(data)=="...1"] <- "datapoint"
names<- colnames(data)
mood_names <- names[grepl( "mood_", names, fixed = TRUE)]
mood_data<-data[c("datapoint",mood_names)]
mood_data<-data[c("datapoint", "mood_satisfi")]
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(reshape2)

set.seed(123)

mdf <- melt(mood_data[1:300,],id.vars="datapoint")

ggplot(mdf, aes( x=datapoint, y=value, colour=variable, group=variable )) + 
  geom_line()# +
  #scale_color_manual(values=c("y1"="black","y2"="red","y3"="orange")) +
  #scale_linetype_manual(values=c("y1"="solid","y2"="solid","y3"="dashed"))

```
